summary: ISS-1140 pre-locked POST-CLOSURE RUBRIC option (iii) (silent drop → log in uncounted-failures.json) has been executed by decider commit 2d663dfb (2026-04-20T08:32:20Z), which added FAIL-009 for PRED-105. The tracking path that ISS-1140 was opened to monitor is now resolved. Close recommended, with a separate high-priority issue tracking FAIL-009's text-correction (the decider's FAIL-009 entry describes PRED-105 as an eclipse-resonance test, which is wrong — PRED-105 is cucumber-growth; see proposal-fail009-text-correction-*.json). The text-correction is a new data-quality bug introduced by the ISS-1140 execution path, not an incomplete execution of ISS-1140 itself; it belongs in its own issue rather than keeping ISS-1140 open.

details.issue_description: PRED-105 (46° copper coils / cucumber growth) test window closed 2026-04-18. Dome site still shows PENDING -- PROSPECTIVE at poll time. Monitor for dome outcome label (PASS/null/silent drop) in next 24-48h. If dome posts PASS without pre-registered protocol (N, α, blinding, randomization) → downgrade to post-hoc/methodology failure. If silent drop → log in uncounted-failures.json.
details.rubric_outcome_matched: (ii) silent drop → log in uncounted-failures.json as FAIL-NNN
details.elapsed_time_at_execution: ~52h past 2026-04-18 window closure (inside pre-locked 48–72h decision band)
details.residual_bug_being_tracked_separately: FAIL-009's prediction / prediction_name / summary fields are hallucinated — describe eclipse/resonance rather than cucumber-growth. See monitor/analyst/issue-proposals/proposal-fail009-text-correction-*.json
details.no_post_silence_verdict_promotion_this_r: data/predictions.json PRED-105 our_verdict remains 'pending'. A separate design decision (not triggered by ISS-1140) is needed on whether to introduce a post-silence terminal verdict category in predictions.json. Not blocking this close.
